citation: Lipman et al., Flow Matching for Generative Modeling, 2023
use: A learned vector field represents v_t(x); explicit path time is part of its input, so omitting it from the backbone is a model-definition error rather than a hyperparameter choice.

citation: Gat et al., Discrete Flow Matching, 2024
use: Discrete endpoint posteriors are time-dependent along a specified probability path. A8 retains A6/A7's valid absorbing DFM sampler and corrects time access in its posterior network.
